meta.description: Validate force push blocking is enabled on protected branches via GitHub or GitLab API

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "non_fast_forward")) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.allow_force_push) && predicates[0].data.values.allow_force_push == false)

assessment.message: Force pushing is disabled in protected branch.

error.message: Force pushes can be sent to protected branch
error.guidance: GitHub: Create a branch ruleset and enable 'Block force pushes'. GitLab: Set allow_force_push to false in branch protection.

meta.description: Validate minimum approval count and prevent self-approval via GitHub or GitLab API

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "pull_request" && rule.parameters.required_approving_review_count >= 1)) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.approvals_before_merge) && predicates[0].data.values.approvals_before_merge >= 1)

assessment.message: Minimum one non-author approval is required

error.message: Pull/Merge requests can be merged without peer review.
error.guidance: GitHub: Set required_approving_review_count >= 1. GitLab: Set approvals_before_merge >= 1.

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "pull_request" && rule.parameters.dismiss_stale_reviews_on_push == true)) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.reset_approvals_on_push) && predicates[0].data.values.reset_approvals_on_push == true)

assessment.message: New commits pushed will reset/dismiss approvals.

error.message: Approvals are not reset when new commits are pushed.
error.guidance: GitHub: Enable 'Dismiss stale pull request approvals when new commits are pushed'. GitLab: Enable 'Remove all approvals when commits are added to the source branch'.

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "pull_request" && rule.parameters.require_last_push_approval == true)) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.merge_requests_disable_committers_approval) && predicates[0].data.values.merge_requests_disable_committers_approval == true)

assessment.message: Pushers/committers cannot approve their own changes.

error.message: Pushers/committers can approve their own changes.
error.guidance: GitHub: Enable 'Require approval of the most recent reviewable push'. GitLab: Enable 'Prevent approval by author and committers'.

meta.description: Validate admin bypass prevention is enabled via GitHub or GitLab API

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "non_fast_forward")) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.push_access_levels) && (size(predicates[0].data.values.push_access_levels) == 0 || predicates[0].data.values.push_access_levels.exists(level, level.access_level == 0)))

assessment.message: Admins cannot bypass branch protection rules. All changes must follow the standard process.

error.message: Admins can bypass branch protection by pushing directly or force-pushing
error.guidance: GitHub: Enable 'Block force pushes' in branch ruleset. GitLab: Set push_access_levels to empty or access_level 0 (No one).

meta.description: Validate code owner review requirements are enabled when CODEOWNERS file exists via GitHub or GitLab API

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "pull_request" && rule.parameters.require_code_owner_review == true)) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.code_owner_approval_required) && predicates[0].data.values.code_owner_approval_required == true)

assessment.message: CODEOWNER approval is required before merging

error.message: CODEOWNER approval is not required before merging
error.guidance: GitHub: Enable 'Require review from Code Owners' in branch ruleset. GitLab: Set code_owner_approval_required to true in branch protection.

meta.description: Validate branch protection settings require pull/merge requests via GitHub or GitLab API

tenets.code: (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) == list && predicates[0].data.values.exists(rule, rule.type == "update")) || (has(predicates[0].data.values) && type(predicates[0].data.values) != list && has(predicates[0].data.values.push_access_levels) && has(predicates[0].data.values.merge_access_levels) && (size(predicates[0].data.values.push_access_levels) == 0 || predicates[0].data.values.push_access_levels.all(p, p.access_level == 0)) && size(predicates[0].data.values.merge_access_levels) > 0 && predicates[0].data.values.merge_access_levels.exists(m, m.access_level > 0))

assessment.message: Direct pushes are disabled. Pull/Merge requests required.

error.message: Direct pushes are enabled so Pull/Merge requests are not required.
error.guidance: GitHub: Create a branch ruleset and enable 'Restrict updates'. GitLab: Configure branch protection with push_access_levels either empty or set to access_level 0 (No access), and ensure merge_access_levels is non-empty with at least one access_level > 0.
